inputs.label: Drum Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the drum head measured across the bearing edge in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the drum head measured across the bearing edge in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tambur başlığının yatak kenarı boyunca santimetre cinsinden ölçülen çapı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser des Trommelfells, gemessen über den Grat des Kessels in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la tête de tambour mesuré sur le bord porteur en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro del parche medido a través del borde de apoyo en centímetros.

inputs.label: Head Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the drum head material (e.g., Mylar) in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the drum head material (e.g., Mylar) in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tambur başlığı malzemesinin (ör. Mylar) milimetre cinsinden kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dicke des Trommelfellmaterials (z. B. Mylar) in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur du matériau de la tête de tambour (ex. Mylar) en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor del material del parche del tambor (p. ej., Mylar) en milímetros.

inputs.label: Head Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric mass density of the drum head material in kilograms per cubic meter.

label_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau de la tête

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric mass density of the drum head material in kilograms per cubic meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tambur başlığı malzemesinin metreküp başına kilogram cinsinden hacimsel kütle yoğunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumenmassendichte des Trommelfellmaterials in Kilogramm pro Kubikmeter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du matériau de la tête de tambour en kilogrammes par mètre cube.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad de masa volumétrica del material del parche del tambor en kilogramos por metro cúbico.

inputs.label: Tension
inputs.businessContext: Tension per unit length applied to the drum head in Newtons per meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tension per unit length applied to the drum head in Newtons per meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tambur başlığına metre başına Newton cinsinden uygulanan birim uzunluk başına gerginlik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Spannung pro Längeneinheit, die auf das Trommelfell ausgeübt wird, in Newton pro Meter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension par unité de longueur appliquée à la tête de tambour en Newtons par mètre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión por unidad de longitud aplicada al parche del tambor en Newtons por metro.

inputs.label: Density Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplicative calibration factor to compensate for material variations or environmental effects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplicative calibration factor to compensate for material variations or environmental effects.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme varyasyonlarını veya çevresel etkileri telafi etmek için çarpımsal kalibrasyon faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikativer Kalibrierungsfaktor zum Ausgleich von Materialschwankungen oder Umgebungseffekten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur multiplicatif d'étalonnage pour compenser les variations de matériau ou les effets environnementaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de calibración multiplicativo para compensar variaciones del material o efectos ambientales.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
